name: Education
description: Discussion of schooling, universities, teaching, or educational institutions — the narrator's own education or education as a theme of their work. Tag when the clip substantively discusses education, not on a passing mention.

name: Career and Work
description: The narrator's professional path: jobs, organizations they worked for or founded, career changes, and significant projects. Tag when the clip is about the work itself, not merely set at a workplace.

name: Community and Belonging
description: Family, neighborhood, and community life; belonging, identity, and social ties. Tag when these are what the clip is about.
